title: Defund Planned Parenthood Act
plain_summary: This bill would stop the federal government from giving any money to Planned Parenthood or any group connected to it. Right now, Planned Parenthood gets some federal funding for certain health services. If this bill becomes law, all federal funding to these organizations would end. The bill would override any other existing laws that currently allow this type of government funding.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.
subjects: Social work, volunteer service, charitable organizations

sections.title: Section 1 Short Title
sections.text: This law can be called the Defund Planned Parenthood Act.

sections.title: Section 2 Prohibition
sections.text: No matter what any other law says, the federal government cannot give any money to Planned Parenthood Federation of America. The government also cannot give money to any organization that works with or is connected to Planned Parenthood.
